pg-net-generator 1.0.11
Copyright (C) 2026 HristoKolev

  -m, --metadataClassName    (Default: DbMetadata) The name of the metadata
                             class.

  -n, --namespace            (Default: PgNet.Generated) The namespace that is
                             passed to the template.

  -p, --poco-class-name      (Default: DbPocos) The name of the poco class.

  -o, --output               Required. The output file location.

  -t, --template-file        The razor template file location.

  -c, --connection-string    The PostgreSQL connection string.

  -r, --get-relations-sql    The sql that returns the db relations.

  -f, --get-functions-sql    The sql that returns the db functions.

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.
